text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I stop by a cafe and spot Fuji Kiseki
with a younger Tracen student inside. It looks like
they just finished eating.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That limited-time edition caramel and banana
cake was so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It really was. But as tasty as it was...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I enjoyed watching you eating happily far more
than I did the cake.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Don't tease me like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm loath to say goodbye, but I unfortunately
must go. Let's spend time together again
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... Yes, I'm fine. I just have a bit of
heartburn.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It happens now and again after I eat sweet things.
Haha... Urgh.
